rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Implementation-level signal routing should be defined in the component implementation annex.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion.
Only insert AGREE clauses that reference valid AADL ports and components in the current scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts define assumptions and guarantees; implementation contracts define bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
